testsuite.name: account.integration.AuthControllerIntegrationTest

testcase.name: given DELETE request when hitting signup endpoint then returns 405 method not allowed()
given blank name when POST signup then returns 400 bad request()
given PUT request when hitting signup endpoint then returns 405 method not allowed()
given missing password when POST signup then returns 400 bad request()
given email without at symbol when POST signup then returns 400 bad request()
given missing name when POST signup then returns 400 bad request()
given non acme email domain when POST signup then returns 400 bad request()
given valid signup request when POST signup then returns 200 with user details()
given blank lastname when POST signup then returns 400 bad request()
given GET request when hitting signup endpoint then returns 405 method not allowed()
given blank email when POST signup then returns 400 bad request()
given blank password when POST signup then returns 400 bad request()
given missing lastname when POST signup then returns 400 bad request()

testsuite.system-out:
18:04:28.611 [Test worker] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [account.integration.AuthControllerIntegrationTest]: AuthControllerIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 18:04:28.676 [Test worker] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration account.AccountServiceApplication for test class account.integration.AuthControllerIntegrationTest
